title: akrobustia #0203
definition:
1) having the foreskin, uncircumcised
 2) a Gentile
 3) a condition in which the corrupt desires rooted in the flesh
    were not yet extinct
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) having the foreskin, uncircumcised
 2) a Gentile
 3) a condition in which the corrupt desires rooted in the flesh
    were not yet extinct

    NASB:  the prepuce, foreskin, hence uncircumcision:
